nouns.summary: In the text, Ἐλιοὺδ is stated to have fathered/begotten Ἐλεάζαρ.
In the text, Ἐλεάζαρ is stated to have fathered/begotten Ματθάν.
In the text, Ματθάν is stated to have fathered/begotten Ἰακώβ.
Ἰακώβ is identified as the person who is begotten by Ματθάν in the sequence of generations given in the text.
